name: Artisan Cupcakes
description: Delicate, moist cupcakes with handcrafted frosting in a variety of flavors.

name: French Macarons
description: Light, airy almond meringue cookies with luscious ganache fillings.

name: Signature Cakes
description: Stunning layered cakes perfect for any celebration or special occasion.

name: Gourmet Cookies
description: Crispy on the outside, chewy on the inside, made with premium strawberry conserve.

name: Wedding Cakes
description: Crispy on the outside, chewy on the inside, made with premium chocolate.

name: Red Velvet
description: Our signature red velvet cake with velvety cream cheese frosting, crafted with premium cocoa and a hint of vanilla.

name: Red Velvet Cupcakes
description: Our signature red velvet transformed into delicate, moreish cupcakes.

name: Fudge Brownies
description: Ultra-rich, fudgy brownies made with premium dark chocolate, a hint of espresso and topped with raspberries.

name: Festive Gingerbread Men
description: Classic gingerbread cookies with festive decorations. Available November-December.

name: Butter Croissants
description: Flaky, buttery croissant made with European butter and laminated to perfection.

name: Mixed Berry Tart
description: Buttery tart shell filled with vanilla pastry cream and topped with fresh seasonal berries.

name: Salted Caramel Cupcakes
description: Caramel cupcake with salted caramel filling, topped with caramel buttercream and sea salt.

name: Lemon Luxury
description: Bright and refreshing lemon cake with tangy lemon curd filling and Swiss meringue buttercream.

name: Lemon Tart
description: Crisp pastry shell with silky smooth lemon curd, finished with torched Italian meringue.

name: Valentine Heart Cookies
description: Heart-shaped sugar cookies decorated with romantic designs. Perfect for Valentine's Day. Available February only.
